metadata.name: Simple Analysis Chain
metadata.description: Basic chain with single LLM step

steps.title: Analyze text
steps.aim: Analyze the input text and provide a summary
steps.reasoning_questions: What is the main topic? What are the key points?
steps.stage_action: Read and summarize the input text
steps.example_reasoning: Looking at this text, the main topic is X. Key points are A, B, C...
